title: Golden Sugar Butter Bites
description: A cozy Australian dessert featuring velvety golden caster sugar butter bites that are both keto-friendly and delightfully sweet.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, soften the butter with a fork until creamy.
Add caster sugar and vanilla extract into the softened butter. Mix well until combined.
Place the mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp around the edges.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving.
